entities.name: TRANSGENIC TECHNIQUES

entities.description: Genes that provide beneficial traits to a plant

entities.name: GENE POOL
entities.description: The total set of genes in a population

entities.description: Biological barriers that prevent sexual reproduction between different species

entities.description: A method of gene transfer using Agrobacterium

entities.description: Methods of transferring DNA directly into a plant cell
